name: editor4b: clicking an image selects it (resize overlay appears)
_note: Regression guard for the picker fix — a replaced element (img) inside a contenteditable is now a hit-testable block, so the click reaches the editor's onClick and selects the image (kind:'node'), which renders .rdt-img-overlay. Previously the click snapped to the nearest heading text via the margin-text-hit and the image was unselectable.
